title: olea luzonica
intro: Olea luzonica is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia, and is also known as the Philippine olive tree. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Olea luzonica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, capsules, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
